ValidationRule.description: PR1064302-420 : Prevents Central_Admin and Regional_Admin users from editing GWB Year records with Published or Locked status.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.GWB_Switch__c.Bypass_VRs__c), OR( $Permission.Central_Admin, $Permission.Regional_Admin ), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Published'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Locked') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have permission to edit this Target record. Records with a status of Published or Locked cannot be modified by a Central or Regional Admin.
